response.text:

rationale: r3c5 is my only reliable peer and their SoC margin justifies the offer; accepting 0.75 kWh improves my survival probability over the 10-hour horizon despite conservative policy.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=['r4c4'].
Your latest belief: r4c4 is unreliable and hoarding; r3c5 is my only reliable source; I must receive energy aggressively to survive the remaining 10 hours..
